reviews.title: Not a resort. Rather a super noisy Club with screamingover a mega Soundsysyem
reviews.text:
They should decide if they wanna operate a resort or an open air event venue with unbearable noise pollution which only stopped at midnight.
We stayed on a Wednesday. There was a weddig party with live music and a stage/soundsystem that was blaring really bad techno music at full volume. How is that possible in a resort where people come to relax nog to get their blokdpressure up to dangerous limits.we felt cheated out of our day off and money.
Stay clear if u r looking for a quiet time.

reviews.title: Disappointing Service Marred Our Stay
reviews.text:
I had the unfortunate experience of staying at a resort where the Front Office department's service was far below the standard one would expect from such an establishment. Despite the beautiful surroundings and impressive amenities, the lack of competent service from the Front Office team significantly marred our holiday experience.


Throughout our stay, the Front office department demonstrated a lack of professionalism and efficiency. Requests made for basic services such as type of room, basic service fee.... Moreover, the staff displayed a clear lack of training, often seeming confused or uninformed about basic resort information and services.
 

Like a drop of water overflowing from a glass, I requested a straightforward invoice for my total bill at checkout. Despite only asking for a basic invoice, not a tax or red invoice, my request was rudely rejected by an individual named Trinh, who redirected me to Agoda, the platform through which I made the booking.

She confidently stated that if all reservations are booked online and not directly at the resort, the resort will not be responsible for providing invoices to guests .I was intrigued. Does this mean that all reservations booked online will not generate income? Also, will the resort not clear government taxes for it?


It's unfortunate to say that while the resort itself had potential to offer a fantastic vacation, the poor service from the Front Office department overshadowed the positives. I hope the resort management takes these concerns seriously and works on improving their staff training and customer service. Until then, I would hesitate to recommend this resort to others.

reviews.title: Avoid at all cost
reviews.text: My family spent more than *** night for a week relaxation. Everyday they have event and 1 night they have a ridiculous gala with a super super loud music from 6pm -10pm; other days with wedding and other company events. It is totally disrespectful to all the guests who want to relax and spend their vacations. Also, we booked a family suit with 4 single beds 2 rooms and they gave us 2 king bed 2 room. When I asked for a cot for my kid, they asked for extra ***  at discount instead of *** . I refused to pay as I booked 6 months in advance and confirmed with the resort. Overall, our experience was terrible, there is zero value for the cost. Pick a different hotel is our recommendation. We will never go back this place again if we visit Viet Nam again.

reviews.title: 1 stars hotel that just looks nice on the outside
reviews.text:
Book a night there based on all the positive reviews…Big MISTAKES. I will make this short. The bad: Room seems very small comparing to a lot of other 4 star and even 3 stars hotels I stayed. NO NOISE INSULATION - you will hear people from the floor above, below, outside the hall ( there will be families with kids running and crying up and down the hall) and from the pool outside your windows AND the people that sings KARAOKE across from the restaurant next door. 
Did I mention that there was 2 mice inside my room when I was eating lunch. They were hiding behind the fridge making noises AND when I checked in there was mice droppings everywhere under the table! I had to scoop up that with napkins! 
On top of all that, the darn AC DIDN’T work! I was laying in my bed and had to open the window to get some fresh air.
With all that problems, we rang the phone down stair and reception said: “Sorry, we have no other rooms to move you to”. I was so fed up that I checked out after being there for 2 hours and I didn’t get any refund!!!
Please do yourself a favor and book a room at the hotels downtown of Phang Rang, that’s where I went after leaving this so called Resort. I even took pics of rat poops as evidence of ya’ll ever want proofs.
reviews.response:
Xin chào anh Minh!

Cám ơn anh đã dành thời gian chia sẻ phản hồi về trải nghiệm về Hoàn Mỹ Resort.

Rất tiếc khi được biết anh Minh đã có trải nghiệm chưa tốt trong thời gian lưu trú tại đây. 
Những phản hồi, ý kiến đóng góp quý báu của anh đã được chia sẻ và làm việc nghiêm túc với bộ phận Buồng Phòng để khắc phục tốt hơn, đảm bảo những dịch vụ mang đến phục vụ khách hàng đều là tốt nhất.

reviews.text:
TV is old , doesnt work. I booked a room with ocean terrace 28sqm, but came up with a tiny room 3.2m x 4.8 + 2sqm ( shower & toilet) bathroom L shape) + balcony
The Air con is quite weird, it drops down automatically to 19 C degree, though I tried to adjusted to 23/ 24 degree muti times. Staff came to check it and advised would fix it in their main system. But nothing happened. During day time was ok as we were outside, but it was quite annoy in night time. We wake up many times to turn on/ off the A.C as it was really cold , then became hot in hours later.  The beach at the back of the hotel is dirty with full of rubbish, plastic bags, full of local people, who ocupied all the hotel bench, shelter huts. It seems nobody care about the enviroment and hygieness along the beach.

reviews.title: So so
reviews.text:
I stayed for one night, and while the hotel is generally okay, it doesn’t quite meet the standard of a proper 4-star establishment. The rooms are small, and the bathroom felt cramped and not very clean. Despite requesting a higher, quieter floor, I was placed on a mid-level floor, which turned out to be very noisy at midnight. The soundproofing was quite poor; I could even hear conversations from the neighboring room. Additionally, the beach area and overall landscape were not well-maintained.
The best part of the hotel was the staff, particularly those in the F&B. They were incredibly friendly, hardworking, and offered helpful suggestions. The food at the restaurant was also good. However, the overall price felt a bit high for what you get, unless you can find a good deal on Agoda. Overall, it was an average experience.

reviews.title: Phòng cách âm siêu tệ!!!!
reviews.text:
Chưa bao giờ ở cái ks nào mà nó ồn khủng khiếp như này luôn. Nhân viên housekeeping lúc dọn phòng không hiểu làm gì mà mình ở phòng khác nghe rầm rầm nguyên cả ngày! Khách ở phòng kế bên nói chuyện thì bên phòng mình vẫn nghe được! Phòng mình hướng biển, cửa đóng kín mít mà xe máy chạy ngoài đường vẫn nghe rất rõ!! 
Buffet ăn sáng tàm tạm. 
Nhân viên dễ thương. 
Thẻ phòng thì chỉ được 1 thẻ. Nếu xin thêm thẻ thì sẽ khoá những thẻ khác  chỉ còn dùng được 1 thẻ! !!!
Với giá này thì sẽ có nhìu lựa chọn hơn ở đây!  
Không recommend!!!!

reviews.title: Need some update on your after-10pm policies
reviews.text:
The last night I've spent at the hotel was horrifying. The neighbors were doing games and karaoke on the patio area for 3 hours straight, with their speaker blasting! I made 3 calls to the receptionist but the only improvement was the speaker turned off. They were still too loud, even when my balcony door closed and curtain shut, I could still heard them singing and cheering, loud and clear.
The receptionists did their best to intervene I believe, but the managers need to imploy more efficient policies to prevent this from happening.
This experience single-handedly ruined my short stay.
Everything else seems okay overall.
If you're considering booking a stay here, avoid weekends as there would be weddings and parties at night.

reviews.text:
A really nice resort, which sadly holds large noisy parties through the weekend. I get it from a business perspective, but the insanely loud music pumped out during weddings and parties is not particularly inviting or welcomed by guests not attending said event. 

It's impossible to relax by the pool or in the restaurant or even your room during these events, which kind of defeats the point of staying in a nice resort.

reviews.title: Acceptable.
reviews.text:
The resort is located right on the beautiful beach of Phan Rang.  
Pros: + the rooms are new and clean,  
+ easy access to the beach (however, the water is a bit deep, so children need life jackets to swim)  
+ there is a relaxing spa, a restaurant, or a bar right by the pool  
+ breakfast is diverse, almost every dish suits my taste. Especially, the banh can and banh xeo are very delicious!!  
Cons:  
- the pool staff's attitude towards customers (while I agree that swimwear regulations are necessary) should consider communicating with guests in a more polite manner. It feels like being scrutinized when one staff member keeps staring as if afraid I might jump into the pool or something?! No friendly smiles at all. Every time I walk past the pool, I feel like I'm being watched in that manner!  
* The friendly reception staff makes up for it a bit, so I would rate it 3 stars instead of 1 star.  

In summary, if it weren't for the rude pool staff, I would probably come back here! Best regards!

Due to the rain we were not able to enjoy the pool and other good-weather facilities. Staff, as usual, very kind and welcoming

reviews.title: Hygiene
reviews.text: My family and I stayed here for one night while traveling across Vietnam. Everything was okay, but the bathroom needed the resort staff to check again after the cleaning ladies finished cleaning the rooms. The bathroom in our room was yellowed, indicating it wasn't properly scrubbed. After I checked into the room, I noticed this and called the cleaning ladies to come and clean it properly. I think the resort doesn't check the rooms after they have been cleaned, and that's why this situation occurred.

reviews.title: honest review
reviews.text:
My family had a 5-day vacation at this great resort. Not much information was available, so I had some difficulty making a decision about which resort/hotel to choose. Therefore, I hope my review will help those who are in the same situation I was in before. (In appreciation of the hospitality the resort showed me during my stay, I am spending some time writing a thorough review.)

The facility is very clean and well managed. I am evaluating this part in comparison to world-class 5-star hotels. No, it doesn't have all the facilities that 5-star hotels have. However, Hoan My resort does a great job of keeping its facility clean and neat. For example, they ensure the pool water stays very clean. We used the pool for 5 consecutive days, and I don't think I saw anything in the water that bothered me. Those who travel to resorts often know that it's very difficult to keep the pool water as clean as they do here - it requires a lot of manpower.

The room is very clean, and the housekeeping department will do their best to keep you happy.

Various room styles are very convenient for those who come for family vacations. We stayed in a two-bedroom - it was great.

The hospitality of the staff is also very impressive. I don't think I had a moment of dissatisfaction regarding how the staff interacted with me during the 5 days. They were more than willing to help with the things you ask for.

The location is good if you are looking to stay right in front of the beach. My children had a good time in the sand after sunset, and it's a private beach. Meanwhile, if you are looking for most of your activities in the city area, keep in mind that it will cost you around 80k for a Grab taxi ride. I went to Winmart in Vincom every day, and the ride from the resort to Vincom is about 40k. With this information, you'd get an idea about transportation costs.

The only room for improvement is food. The breakfast buffet is quite good, but the kitchen closes after breakfast. So practically, there is no kitchen after breakfast - meaning there is no poolside bar from which you could order food and drinks, no room service with food and beverages. (There is a restaurant right next to the resort, but it's not a typical resort kitchen from which you order room services.)

Will I return to this resort? YES. Do I recommend this resort to other travelers? YES.

I hope next time there will be food and beverages ready so I don't have to order Grab food (they weren't very good despite several attempts from various restaurants).

reviews.title: Hoàn Mỹ Resort Ninh Chử – An ideal stopover by the Ninh Thuận beach.
reviews.text:
Are you looking for an ideal retreat for your vacation in Ninh Thuan? Hoan My Resort is the perfect destination for you!
Located in a prime beachfront location, Hoan My Resort offers a peaceful space, immersing you in pristine nature with soft white sandy beaches, clear blue waters, and rows of lush trees swaying in the breeze. The resort is designed in a modern style combined with traditional charm, creating a feeling of intimacy while still being luxurious.
Highlights at Hoan My Resort:
• Premium rooms: Spacious, fully equipped, with views of the sea or lush gardens.
• Infinity pool by the beach: A stunning place for photos, absolute relaxation.
• Diverse cuisine: Restaurant serving fresh seafood and Ninh Thuan specialties.
• Professional service: Friendly staff, always ready to assist you 24/7.
Additionally, from the resort, you can easily travel to famous attractions such as Vinh Hy Bay, Hang Rai, Nam Cuong Sand Dunes, and Poklong Garai Cham Towers…
Hoan My Resort Phan Rang – Where emotions soar, and vacations are complete!
Come and enjoy – you deserve the best!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
We had the most wonderful family getaway at Hoan My Resort! Traveling with a young child can sometimes be a challenge, but from the moment we arrived, everything was smooth, relaxing, and filled with warmth — all thanks to the exceptional team, especially the lovely Thuc Anh.

She greeted us with the kindest smile and genuine hospitality that made us feel right at home. Throughout our stay, Thuc Anh went above and beyond to accommodate every request and concern we had as a family. Whether it was helping us find child-friendly activities or simply checking in to ensure we were enjoying ourselves — her attentiveness made all the difference.

And the view from our room? Absolutely picture perfect. We woke up each morning to a stunning panorama of majestic mountains meeting the sparkling beach. It felt like we had stepped into a postcard — the kind of view that instantly puts you at peace and makes you want to soak in every moment.

The resort itself is beautifully maintained and incredibly peaceful, with open spaces that our child adored exploring. Our room was spacious, comfortable, and perfectly suited for a family stay.

We left Hoan My with full hearts and unforgettable memories. Thank you, Thuc Anh, and the entire Hoan My team, for creating such a special experience for our family. We can’t wait to return!

reviews.title: Excellent location and amenities
reviews.text: We had a great stay at the hoàn my resort, the room was spacious, the air conditioning excellent, the view from the lobby was spectacular and the pool and convenient access to the beach was stellar. The staff were also very friendly and accommodating to all requests. I would gladly stay again the next time I'm in the area.

reviews.title: Beautiful resort direct to the beach
reviews.text: The resort has a beautiful beach. My room is fantastic with sea view. It also has a lovely swimming pool. The breakfast had incredibly many choices, including local foods. All the staff is helpful and friendly.

reviews.title: A wonderful experience.
reviews.text:
I booked a room and stayed here from December 21-23, 2022, and it was truly an experience worth having. The staff, from the reception to the housekeeping, were very enthusiastic in their support, especially the two receptionists, Bình and Phương. I found them to be very hospitable and eager to help. The facilities are new and clean. The food is very delicious, especially the bánh xèo and bánh căn; everyone should definitely give them a try!

Overall, I am completely satisfied and will definitely stop by next time ^^

reviews.title: Villas on the beach don't get better!
reviews.text: Closest ever to the beach and most luxurious - doesn't get better :) high tide might even splash you in your own private pool!

reviews.title: Nice new resort in Phan Rang
reviews.text:
A very local resort, in a good way.

Stayed in a nice if somewhat odd shaped room facing the oceanfront.

Special mention that the foliage in the resort are really very nice, flowers with vibrant colours all over.

There was some noise due to a birthday event up to 9pm but it was fine after that,  

Breakfast is frenetic as it was full occupancy that day, but it is a good breakfast with very nice Banh Xeo and tropical fruits.

Definitely recommended if you are visiting Phan Rang,

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Khách sạn 4 sao nhưng trong buffe sáng không có được máy pha cà phê Cappuccino hay Latte tự động dành cho khách nước ngoài. Đồ ăn Buffe cũng cho khách Việt nam là chính. Bể bơi đẹp, bãi biển OK nhưng sóng hơi to. Tối có quán cà phê của Khách sạn ngay bãi biển rất Chill. Phòng ngủ trên tường có vết máu chắc do khách đập muỗi, tường xung quanh phòng không sạch.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Trước hết, xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn lưu trú tại khách sạn và dành thời gian chia sẻ những đánh giá rất chi tiết về trải nghiệm của mình.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng Quý khách hài lòng với hồ bơi, khu vực bãi biển cũng như không gian quán cà phê buổi tối – đây là những điểm mà khách sạn luôn nỗ lực phát huy để mang lại trải nghiệm thư giãn tốt nhất.

Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi cũng chân thành xin lỗi vì những điểm chưa đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của Quý khách. Ý kiến của Quý khách về thực đơn buffet sáng, đặc biệt là việc thiếu máy pha cà phê tự động như Cappuccino hay Latte, đã được ghi nhận và chuyển đến bộ phận liên quan để xem xét cải thiện, nhằm phục vụ đa dạng hơn nhu cầu của khách quốc tế.

Đồng thời, chúng tôi rất tiếc về tình trạng vệ sinh phòng chưa được đảm bảo như phản ánh. Đây là vấn đề nghiêm trọng và không phù hợp với tiêu chuẩn dịch vụ mà khách sạn hướng tới. Chúng tôi đã làm việc lại với bộ phận buồng phòng để kiểm tra, chấn chỉnh quy

reviews.text:
대부분 만족스런 숙소입니다. 
호텔 건물 레스토랑과 저녁에만 호텔에서 운영하는 야외 레스토랑을 다 이용했습니다. 야외 레스토랑에서먹은 음식이 만족스러워서 다음날 또 갔는데 이날 야외다른행사로 시끄러워 다시 호텔건물 레스토랑으로 들어 갔습니다. 똑같은 메뉴판, 똑같은 음식 주문 했는데 어제와 달라서 물어보니 디피만다르고 같다고 합니다. 어제와 음식양 차이가 엄청적다고 하니 알아본다고 주방에 왔다갔다 하시더니 호텔내 레스토랑은 세금과 봉사료가 포함되어 양차이가 난다고합니다.  똑같은 메뉴판인데? 생각하며 더이상 물어보지 않았습니다. 레스토랑 이용하시는분 참고하세요~

reviews.text: Resort sạch đẹp, nhân viên thân thiện và chu đáo. Tôi sẽ tiếp tục ở đây trong lần ghé thăm kế tiếp!

reviews.title: Không hài lòng
reviews.text: Mình đặt phòng nghỉ dưỡng 2 ngày 1 đêm ở đây mà bên resort tổ chức sự kiện gì đó bày bàn làm sân khấu lấn hết khu tiện ích, khách hàng như mình đến muốn yên tĩnh nghỉ ngơi có view đẹp để tận hưởng mà resort làm vậy quá tệ, không hề nghĩ cho khách hàng, nơi như vậy mình nghĩ mọi người nên cân nhắc với giá xem có nên đến hay không
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Hoàn Mỹ Resort chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm. Chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi vì sự kiện được tổ chức trong thời gian Quý khách lưu trú đã ảnh hưởng đến không gian nghỉ dưỡng và sự yên tĩnh mà Quý khách mong đợi.

Chúng tôi hiểu rằng khi lựa chọn một kỳ nghỉ, đặc biệt tại một resort ven biển, Quý khách kỳ vọng sự thư giãn và riêng tư. Việc bố trí sự kiện gây ảnh hưởng đến khu vực tiện ích là điều chúng tôi rất lấy làm tiếc và xin nhận thiếu sót trong công tác sắp xếp không gian.

Resort đã ghi nhận ý kiến của Quý khách và sẽ rà soát lại quy trình tổ chức sự kiện nhằm đảm bảo cân bằng giữa hoạt động nội bộ và trải nghiệm của khách lưu trú trong thời gian tới.

Chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp Quý khách trở lại để mang đến một kỳ nghỉ đúng nghĩa, yên tĩnh và trọn vẹn hơn.

Trân trọng,
Hoàn Mỹ Resort

reviews.title: Trải nghiệm ko thoải mái tại Ninh Thuận
reviews.text:
Gia đình mình nghỉ 1 đêm ở đây thấy ngoài nhân viên nhiệt tình dễ thương thì:
- Phòng khách sạn nhỏ, thiết bị vệ sinh cũ, nhà tắm có mùi hôi.
- Ko có khu vui chơi cho trẻ em, ko có nhà hàng cafe riêng buổi sáng. 
- Đèn phòng và khu khách sạn buổi tối quá tối.
- Nhà hàng nhỏ, ko đủ chỗ ngồi, phải ghép bàn với nhiều gia đình khác.
- Đồ ăn sáng ở khách sạn ít món, và hương vị món ăn dưới mức trung bình, hôm đó có pancake hôi tanh mùi trứng hư, khách ngồi cùng bàn cũng thấy vậy, các bé ăn ko đc, lấy xong đều bỏ, có complain nhưng bếp bảo mới làm lúc sáng, bánh ko có mùi, hoàn toàn bình thường!!! 
Nếu được chọn thì mình chỉ dừng chân ăn trưa/tối chứ ko lưu trú tại Ninh Thuận

reviews.text: Ks này vị trí tốt, vừa tắm biển và hồ thuận tiện sạch. Tuy nhiên nếu cao điểm nhiều khách hồ bơi so với quy mô phòng thì bé. Kể cả phòng ăn (Gió) qui mô nhỏ buổi sáng ko đủ chỗ. Điểm + là đồ ăn ngon (quan điểm cá nhân). Ks mới xây nhưng khâu bảo trì không chú trọng. Nhân viên dọn phòng thiếu chuyên nghiệp (có thề tùy nv). 1 điểm nữa là giá phòng cũng cần có chính sách minh bạch hơn. Tại khu Ninh Chữ thì Hoàn Mỹ vẫn là ks tốt nhất trong thời điểm hiện tại.

Kính gửi Qúy Khách,

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã tiếp tục chia sẻ thêm ý kiến về trải nghiệm tại nhà hàng của Resort Hoàn Mỹ Ninh Chử

Chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi vì sự bất tiện mà Quý khách đã gặp phải khi khu vực trong nhà chưa được bật điều hòa, gây cảm giác nóng bức và không thoải mái, đặc biệt trong điều kiện thời tiết nắng nóng. Đồng thời, vấn đề về côn trùng cũng là điều chúng tôi rất quan tâm và lấy làm tiếc khi đã ảnh hưởng đến trải nghiệm của Quý khách.

Ý kiến của Quý khách là hoàn toàn xác đáng. Chúng tôi đã ghi nhận và sẽ làm việc lại với bộ phận liên quan để đảm bảo khu vực trong nhà luôn được vận hành điều hòa phù hợp, cũng như tăng cường các biện pháp kiểm soát côn trùng, nhằm mang lại không gian dùng bữa dễ chịu và đúng tiêu chuẩn hơn.

Rất mong Quý khách thông cảm và hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được phục vụ Quý khách tốt hơn trong những lần tới.

Trân trọng,
Mr. Tam Nguyễn 
Customer Service Manager
